extra.message: The regex pattern r'((a)+)+' is a catastrophic backtracking (ReDoS) pattern. All re functions using this pattern (re.match, re.search, re.findall, etc.) with user-controlled input can be triggered to consume CPU for an exponential amount of time with crafted input like 'aaaaaaaaaaX'.
